reg [11:0] inf_dat_ov; //reg inf_vld_o; reg scl_o; reg sda_o; reg sda_en; reg [8:0] c_state; reg [8:0] n_state; reg [1:0] inf_start_reg; // 寄存器，检测inf_start_reg的上升沿信号 reg [7:0] shift_out_reg; // adr 和 dat 暂存在该寄存器中，随时钟移出到SDA reg rec_ack; // 接收slave返回ACK应答，为1表明收到slave的ACK信号 reg [14:0] cnt_bit;// 计数器，计数范围是0 - CLK_DIV，控制每个状态机持续时间，进而控制SDA和SCL //============================================================================== // FSM macro definition //============================================================================== parameter IDLE = 9'b0_0000_0001; parameter START = 9'b0_0000_0010;// 检测到数据接口的开始信号，sda做出开始时序 parameter SEND = 9'b0_0000_0100; parameter RECACK = 9'b0_0000_1000;// 接收到slave的ack响应 parameter READ = 9'b0_0001_0000;// 读取slave的返回数据 parameter SENDACK = 9'b0_0010_0000;// 给slave发送响应 parameter READ2 = 9'b0_0100_0000;// 接收第2次8bit数据 parameter SENDACK2 = 9'b0_1000_0000; parameter FINISH = 9'b1_0000_0000;// 操作结束，状态回到IDLE以后，形成一个完整sda结束时序 //============================================================================== // calculation definition //============================================================================== // TMP275 9-bit resolution,once conversation need time 27.5ms,is 1/27.5 KHz = 0.037KHz = 37Hz // I2C MIN SCL rate is 1KHz, my typical values is 5KHz `define I2C_FREQ_5KHZ `ifdef I2C_FREQ_5KHZ parameter CLK_DIV = (20000 - 1);//5KHz is 100MHz/20000 `else parameter CLK_DIV = (5000 - 1);//20KHz is 100MHz/5000 `endif //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ // 检测inf_start_reg的上升沿信号 always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin inf_start_reg <= 2'b0; end else begin inf_start_reg <= { inf_start_reg[0],inf_start_i}; end end wire inf_start_posedge = ( 2'b01 == inf_start_reg); //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ // cnt_bit 计数范围是0 - CLK_DIV，控制每个状态机持续时间，进而控制SDA和SCL always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin cnt_bit <= 15'd0; end else if( IDLE == c_state ) begin cnt_bit <= 15'd0; end else if( cnt_bit == CLK_DIV ) begin cnt_bit <= 15'd0; end else begin cnt_bit <= cnt_bit + 15'd1; end end //wire bit_clk = ( cnt_bit == CLK_DIV );//测试用 // -------------------------------------------------------------- // 输出SDA数据 // 进入发送数据（SEND）状态后，计数并移出数据 reg [2:0] cnt_SEND;// counter for SEND state always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin cnt_SEND <= 3'd0; end else if( (SEND == c_state)&&(cnt_bit == CLK_DIV) ) begin cnt_SEND <= cnt_SEND + 3'd1; end end // 进入发送数据（SEND）状态的前一个状态（START），就将inf_dat_iv存入shift_out_reg // 进入发送数据（SEND）状态，按照8bit长度向MSB移位，MSB最后给SDA数据线 always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin shift_out_reg <= 8'd0; end else if( (SEND == c_state)&&( cnt_bit == CLK_DIV ) )//进入对应状态，开始移出数据 begin shift_out_reg <= ( shift_out_reg << 1 ); end else if( START == c_state ) begin shift_out_reg <= { inf_adr_iv,1'b1}; end end //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ // 确认 slave 返回 ACK 信号 always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin rec_ack <= 1'd0; end else if( (RECACK == c_state) && (1'b0 == sda_i)&&(cnt_bit == CLK_DIV/2) ) begin rec_ack <= 1'b1; end else if(RECACK != c_state) begin rec_ack <= 1'd0; end end //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ // 移入SDA线上数据 reg [2:0] cnt_READ;// counter for SEND state reg [7:0] shift_in_reg; always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin cnt_READ <= 3'd0; end else if( (cnt_bit == CLK_DIV)&&( (READ == c_state)||(READ2 == c_state) ) ) begin cnt_READ <= cnt_READ + 3'd1; end end // 在READ和READ2状态，采样SDA always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin shift_in_reg <= 8'd0; end else if( (cnt_bit == CLK_DIV)&&( (READ == c_state) || (READ2 == c_state) ) ) begin shift_in_reg <= { shift_in_reg[6:0],sda_i}; end else if( IDLE == c_state ) //在读数据之前将接收数据寄存器清空 begin shift_in_reg <= 8'd0; end end //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ // refresh sates always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin c_state <= IDLE; end else if( (IDLE != c_state)&&(cnt_bit == CLK_DIV) )// 每个状态机持续时间为1/5KHz的整数倍 begin c_state <= n_state; end else if(IDLE == c_state)//IDLE状态时，条件满足后马上切换到START状态 begin c_state <= n_state; end end // switch states always@(*) begin case(c_state) IDLE: begin if(1'b1 == inf_start_posedge) begin n_state <= START; end else begin n_state <= IDLE; end end START: begin n_state <= SEND; end SEND: begin if( 3'b111 == cnt_SEND ) begin n_state <= RECACK; end else begin n_state <= SEND; end end RECACK: begin if(1'b1 == rec_ack) begin n_state <= READ;//收到slave的ACK信号，下一状态开始读数据 end else begin n_state <= FINISH;//没有收到slave的ACK信号，传输终止 //n_state <= READ;//没有收到slave的ACK信号，一直等待 end end READ: begin if( 3'b111 == cnt_READ ) begin n_state <= SENDACK; end else begin n_state <= READ; end end SENDACK: begin n_state <= READ2; end READ2: begin if( 3'b111 == cnt_READ ) begin n_state <= SENDACK2; end else begin n_state <= READ2; end end SENDACK2: begin n_state <= FINISH; end FINISH: begin n_state <= IDLE; end default: begin n_state <= IDLE; end endcase end // output sda_o and sda_en always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin sda_o <= 1'b1; sda_en <= 1'b1;// default is output and output 1 end else begin case(c_state) IDLE: begin sda_o <= 1'b1; sda_en <= 1'b1;// default is output and output 1 end START: begin sda_o <= 1'b0; sda_en <= 1'b1;// default is output and output 1 end SEND: begin sda_o <= shift_out_reg[7]; sda_en <= 1'b1;// default is output and output 1 end RECACK: begin // release sda for read data sda_o <= 1'bz; sda_en <= 1'b0; end READ: begin // release sda for read data sda_o <= 1'bz; sda_en <= 1'b0; end SENDACK: begin sda_o <= 1'b0; sda_en <= 1'b1; end READ2: begin // release sda for read data sda_o <= 1'bz; sda_en <= 1'b0; end SENDACK2: begin // force sda to 1 sda_o <= 1'b1; sda_en <= 1'b1; end FINISH: begin // force sda to 0 sda_o <= 1'b0; sda_en <= 1'b1; end default: begin sda_o <= 1'b1; sda_en <= 1'b1;// default is output and output 1 end endcase end end // output SCL always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin scl_o <= 1'b1;//默认输出高电平 end else begin case(c_state) IDLE: begin scl_o <= 1'b1; end START: //做出SDA下降沿 begin if(CLK_DIV/2 == cnt_bit) begin scl_o <= 1'b0; end end SEND, //做出SDA时序 RECACK, READ, SENDACK, READ2, SENDACK2: begin if(CLK_DIV/4 == cnt_bit) begin scl_o <= 1'b1; end else if(CLK_DIV*3/4 == cnt_bit) begin scl_o <= 1'b0; end end FINISH: //做出SDA上升沿 begin if(CLK_DIV/4 == cnt_bit) begin scl_o <= 1'b1; end end default: begin scl_o <= 1'b1; end endcase end end // output inf_busy_o always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin inf_busy_o <= 1'b0; end else if( START == c_state) begin inf_busy_o <= 1'b1; end else if( IDLE == c_state) begin inf_busy_o <= 1'b0; end end // output inf_vld_o assign inf_vld_o = ( (SENDACK2 == c_state)&&(CLK_DIV/2 == cnt_bit) );//keep stable one clock period //always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) // begin // if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) // begin // inf_vld_o <= 1'b0; // end // else if( SENDACK2 == c_state) // begin // inf_vld_o <= 1'b1; // end // // else if( FINISH == c_state) // begin // inf_vld_o <= 1'b0; // end // end // output inf_dat_ov always@(posedge clk_sys_100M_i or negedge rst_sys_n_i) begin if(1'b0 == rst_sys_n_i) begin inf_dat_ov <= 12'd0; end else if( SENDACK == c_state) begin inf_dat_ov[11:4] <= shift_in_reg; end else if( SENDACK2 == c_state) begin inf_dat_ov[3:0] <= shift_in_reg[7:4]; end else if( FINISH == c_state) begin inf_dat_ov <= 12'd0; end end endmodule 4 参考|reference
